articles.title: Anthropic’s Alarming Mythos Findings Replicated With Off-the-Shelf AI, Researchers Say
articles.description: Security researchers used GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6 in an open-source harness to reproduce Anthropic's Mythos vulnerability findings for under $30 per scan.

In brief

  • Study suggests vulnerability discovery is already cheap and widely accessible.
